is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of uncomplicated falciparum malaria; DHFR/DHPS mutations in P. falciparum assessed.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfdhfr 51,108 and Pfdhps 437,540 — all target codons; Table 1 gives prevalences.

sub_country_location.evidence: All samples from Buenaventura, a single seaport town on the Pacific coast of Colombia — a sub-national location.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Conducted February 1999 to May 2000, within a 3-year window.

african_field_samples.evidence: Samples collected in Buenaventura, Colombia (South America), not in an African country.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical cohort study of 120 subjects treated and followed.

duplicate_risk.evidence: New field collection in Buenaventura; no mention of consortium or shared dataset.

supplement.evidence: Frequencies present in Table 1 in the main text.

assessment.summary: Primary study of 120 falciparum malaria patients in Buenaventura, Colombia (1999–2000), reporting extractable Pfdhfr and Pfdhps mutation frequencies. Fails eligibility solely because samples are from Colombia, not Africa.
exclusion_reasons: Samples were collected in Colombia (South America), not an African country.
